chatbot.title: AgroMitra AI Assistant
chatbot.intro: Here are some things I can help with:

home.ctaTitle: Take Your Farming Business to the Next Level
home.ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of farmers already selling smarter with AgroMitra.

hero.description: Connect directly with verified buyers and sellers. Get the best market prices, secure transactions, and a smarter way to grow your farming business.

features.title: Why Choose AgroMitra?
features.f1Desc: Sell directly to buyers without middlemen.
features.f2Desc: 100% secure payments via UPI and Bank Transfer.
features.f3Desc: Get instant help regarding weather and crops.

productsPage.title: Our Products
productsPage.explore_p: Explore seeds, fertilizers, tools, vegetables and more.

product.default_desc: High quality agriculture product sourced directly from verified farmers.

cartPage.title: Your Cart
cartPage.loginRequired: Please login to view your cart.
cartPage.subtitle: Review your selected products before placing order.
cartPage.emptyText: Add products from marketplace to see them here.

checkoutPage.title: Checkout
checkoutPage.subtitle: Review your items and select a delivery address.
checkoutPage.addressRequired: Please add or select a delivery address before continuing.
checkoutPage.stockWarning: Some items exceed available stock. Please update your cart.
checkoutPage.addAddressWarning: Please add a delivery address to continue.

paymentPage.title: Payment
paymentPage.subtitle: Choose your payment method and confirm your order.
paymentPage.orderIdMissing: Order created but order ID not found in response
paymentPage.desktopHint: Scan the QR code below with your phone's UPI app, or open this page on your mobile to pay directly.
paymentPage.scanApps: Scan with GPay ? PhonePe ? Paytm ? BHIM
paymentPage.demoNotice: After paying via UPI app or QR, click "I Have Paid" below. Real production requires Razorpay / PhonePe / Paytm webhook verification for auto-confirmation.
paymentPage.codNote: Your order will be placed. Payment collected at delivery.

footer.desc: A modern agriculture marketplace connecting farmers and buyers directly with a cleaner and smarter digital experience.

auth.registerSubtitle: Create your AgroMitra account and continue your journey.
auth.visual_title: Start buying and selling with confidence
auth.visual_p: Create your AgroMitra account to explore products as a buyer or manage and sell agricultural inventory as a seller.
auth.buyer_access_p: Explore products, manage your cart, and shop smarter.
auth.seller_access_p: List products, reach buyers faster, and grow online.
auth.otp_sent: A verification code has been sent to
auth.buyer_login_p: Access premium agricultural products, manage your cart, and buy seeds, fertilizers, tools, vegetables, and fruits from one modern marketplace.
auth.trusted_products_p: Buy with confidence from a cleaner and better marketplace.
auth.fast_shopping_p: Explore products, compare options, and order quickly.
auth.buyer_login_subtitle: Login to continue shopping and manage your AgroMitra cart.
auth.seller_login_subtitle: Login to manage and sell your products on AgroMitra.
auth.seller_login_p: Login as a seller to manage products, reach buyers faster, and sell your agricultural inventory with confidence.
auth.manage_products_p: Add, organize, and showcase your inventory professionally.
auth.reach_buyers_p: Expand your visibility and connect with real customers.
auth.error_invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address.
auth.error_password_length: Password must be at least 6 characters long.
auth.success_register_email: Registration successful! Please check your email for a confirmation link.
auth.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.recovery_p: Enter your email address to receive a reset link
auth.reset_link_sent: Password reset link sent to your email. Please check your inbox.
auth.password_updated: Password updated successfully! Redirecting to login...
auth.error_no_session: Invalid or expired reset session. Please request a new link.

addresses.add_to_shop: Add a delivery address to continue shopping.

orders.track_p: Track all your purchases from AgroMitra.
orders.empty_p: Start shopping to see your orders here.

tracking.subtitle: Enter your Order ID below to check the current status of your order
tracking.fetching_p: Please wait while we securely retrieve your order status.
tracking.id_invalid: Invalid Order ID or Order not found.
tracking.secure_p: Your data is safe and secure
tracking.thankyou: Thank you for choosing AgroMitra. Happy Farming!

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.name: Your Name
contact.header_p: Have questions about our products, support, or agricultural services? Our team is here to help you quickly and professionally.
contact.info_p: Fill out the form and our support team will get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.quick_response_p: Most queries are answered within 24 hours
contact.send_message_p: Tell us what you need and our team will contact you soon.
contact.subject: Subject

reviews.title: Testimonials
reviews.subtitle: What Farmers Are Saying
reviews.rajesh_text: AgroMitra changed how I sell my harvest. I used to rely on middlemen who took a huge cut, but now I sell directly to verified buyers at market price.
reviews.anita_text: The dashboard is so easy to use. I listed my organic tomatoes and got 5 bulk orders in the first week. The secure payment system gives me peace of mind.
reviews.suresh_text: Finding quality agricultural products was a hassle before. With AgroMitra, I can connect directly with real farmers. The quality of produce has never been better.

about.title: A smarter digital bridge between farmers and buyers
about.p1: AgroMitra is a modern agricultural marketplace designed to make buying and selling more transparent, efficient, and accessible.
about.p2: We help farmers showcase products directly to buyers while giving customers a clean, premium, and trustworthy shopping experience.
about.point1: Fair pricing with direct marketplace access
about.point2: Modern product discovery and cleaner buying flow
about.point3: Built for real agricultural commerce growth

collective.loadFailed: Collective buying data could not be loaded.
collective.validation: Product, area and quantity are required.
collective.joined: Request joined! Quantity from the same area is now being combined.
collective.title: Collective Buying
collective.subtitle: Buyers from the same area join one product group. Quantity is combined so sellers can offer bulk discounts or deals.
collective.emptyText: Create the first request to start combining buyers.

categoryProducts.title: {{category}} Products
categoryProducts.emptyText: Check back later for new arrivals in {{category}}.

paymentSuccess.scan: Scan with GPay, PhonePe, or Paytm

orderConfirmed.title: Payment Successful!
orderConfirmed.subtitle: Your order has been confirmed and is being processed
